tasks.subject: P2 Task 1: DTOs + agent_wake topic + config knobs
tasks.description: AgentWakeEvent/ApprovalRequest/AgentMessage/AgentMsgToolCall + SessionAwaitingApproval + AgentSession.PendingApproval/Transcript + config knobs + ForbidList; constants.TopicAgentWake. Verify: go test ./daemon/dto/ -run TestAgent -v && go build ./daemon/constants/

tasks.subject: P2 Task 2: Resumable loop + approval pause + forbid-list
tasks.description: Transcript-driven resumable runLoop; ModeApprove pauses with PendingApproval; ForbidList refused even if auto. Verify: go test ./daemon/services/agent/ -run Loop -v

tasks.subject: P2 Task 3: Approve/Deny/Cancel resume
tasks.description: ApproveAction (execute+continue / deny+continue, forbid re-check, id mismatch errors) + CancelSession. Verify: go test ./daemon/services/agent/ -run 'Approve|Deny|Cancel' -v

tasks.subject: P2 Task 4: Approval TTL sweeper
tasks.description: SweepExpiredApprovals default-denies stale awaiting_approval sessions. Verify: go test ./daemon/services/agent/ -run Sweep -v

tasks.subject: P2 Task 5: Wake trigger + Start loop
tasks.description: trigger.go Start(ctx) subscribes agent_wake; handleWake debounce/dedup/cooldown/concurrency; startAutonomousSession; sweep ticker. Verify: go test ./daemon/services/agent/ -run Trigger -v

tasks.subject: P2 Task 6: alerting+watchdog publish agent_wake; orchestrator wiring
tasks.description: Engine/Runner SetEventBus+publishWake; orchestrator SetEventBus on engine/runner/agent + mcpServer.SetAgent + agentSvc.Start(ctx) before collectors. Verify: go test ./daemon/services/alerting/ ./daemon/services/watchdog/ -run EventBus -v && go build ./...

tasks.subject: P2 Task 7: REST approve/cancel endpoints
tasks.description: POST /agent/sessions/{id}/approve + /cancel handlers + routes. Verify: go test ./daemon/services/api/ -run Agent -v

tasks.subject: P2 Task 8: MCP agent_* tools
tasks.description: SetAgent + registerAgentTools (start/get/list/approve). Verify: go test ./daemon/services/mcp/ -run Agent -v && go build ./...

tasks.subject: P2 Task 9: Docs, CHANGELOG, CodeRabbit, Unraid verify
tasks.description: USER-ORDERED GATE. CHANGELOG+docs+swagger; pre-commit+test; CodeRabbit CLI; ansible build,deploy,verify; enabled-path incident->wake->approve. Verify: make pre-commit-run && make test && ansible-playbook -i ansible/inventory.yml ansible/deploy.yml --tags build,deploy,verify
